mapper.insert: insert into sys_user (id, user_code, user_name, account, department_id, auth_mode, status, email, mobile, last_login, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{userCode}, #{userName}, #{account}, #{departmentId}, #{authMode}, #{status}, #{email}, #{mobile}, #{lastLogin}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update sys_user set status = #{status}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select r.*, count(ur.id) as user_count from sys_role r left join sys_user_department_role ur on r.id = ur.role_id
and (r.role_code like #{keywordLike} or r.role_name like #{keywordLike} or r.description like #{keywordLike})
and r.status = #{status}
group by r.id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.description, r.status, r.sort_no, r.created_at, r.updated_at order by r.sort_no asc, r.updated_at desc

select r.*, count(ur.id) as user_count from sys_role r left join sys_user_department_role ur on r.id = ur.role_id where r.id = #{id} group by r.id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.description, r.status, r.sort_no, r.created_at, r.updated_at
select r.*, 0 as user_count from sys_role r where r.role_code = #{roleCode}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_role (id, role_code, role_name, description, status, sort_no, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{description}, #{status}, #{sortNo}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update sys_role set status = #{status}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select ur.*, r.role_code, r.role_name from sys_user_department_role ur join sys_role r on ur.role_id = r.id where ur.user_id = #{userId} order by r.sort_no
select count(1) from sys_user_department_role where role_id = #{roleId}
select count(1) from sys_data_policy where subject_type = 'ROLE' and subject_id = #{roleId}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user_department_role (id, user_id, department_id, role_id, created_at) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{departmentId}, #{roleId}, current_timestamp)
mapper.select: select * from sys_permission where status = 'ENABLED' order by sort_no asc
mapper.insert: insert into sys_permission (id, permission_code, permission_name, permission_type, parent_code, route_path, sort_no, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{permissionCode}, #{permissionName}, #{permissionType}, #{parentCode}, #{routePath}, #{sortNo}, #{status}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp)
mapper.select: select permission_code from sys_role_permission where role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_role_permission (id, role_id, permission_code, created_at) values (#{id}, #{roleId}, #{permissionCode}, current_timestamp)

insert into sys_data_policy (id, policy_name, subject_type, subject_id, subject_name, data_scope, allow_export, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{policyName}, #{subjectType}, #{subjectId}, #{subjectName}, #{dataScope}, #{allowExport}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: select * from sys_data_policy_scope where policy_id = #{policyId} order by scope_type, id
mapper.insert: insert into sys_data_policy_scope (id, policy_id, scope_type, scope_value, scope_label) values (#{id}, #{policyId}, #{scopeType}, #{scopeValue}, #{scopeLabel})
